statement: In every magma, Equation 3010 (`x = ((y * (z * z)) * x) * w`) implies Equation 4677 (`(x * y) * z = (y * x) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0069
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z z)) x) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op (op x y) z) = (op (op y x) z)
